title: Products - Changing the VAT Level for food products
workflow_title: Products - Changing the VAT Level for food products

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Products.
Use the Product group dropdown to select the groups that contain food items.
Click the VAT entry of a product and select your preferred VAT rate from the dropdown.
If a whole product group is food, update its default VAT too: open Product groups.
Click the pencil icon of the group you want to update.
Then check Price management for price-rule sets that change VAT, and send the changes via General > General > Send.
